meaning: n.毒药,败坏道德之事,毒害vt.毒害,败坏,使中毒vi.放毒,下毒
examples: Her blood was found to contain poison.
Some mushrooms contain a deadly poison.
There is no known antidote to the poison.
And the cost in terms of beggar-thy-neighbour protectionism and diplomatic poison would be dire.
Luckily, the results from those and other trials showed that the drug didn't poison patients.
